hero.art_prompt: Arjun, an 18 year old Indian student in a casual collared shirt, confident and hopeful, exploring coding on a laptop at home, bright aspirational mood.

panels.narration: Fresh out of 12th, Arjun loved computers.
panels.img_prompt: Arjun, 18, happily exploring simple code shapes on a laptop at home, curious and driven, tidy room.

panels.narration: But too many options left him unsure where to start.
panels.img_prompt: Arjun looking a little overwhelmed by many browser options on a laptop, rubbing his head, modest room.

panels.narration: Then he found a clear, recognised online BCA.
panels.img_prompt: Arjun smiling with clarity at a laptop showing a clean BCA page with specialisations, warm bright home.

panels.narration: He picked a specialisation and started with guidance.
panels.img_prompt: Arjun confidently starting his first BCA lesson on a laptop, notebook ready, focused and happy, warm light.

turn.title: Why Start Your BCA Here
points: Choose in-demand tech tracks: Data Science, Cloud, AI, Cyber Security and more.
Study 100% online, anytime, from anywhere. No campus, no commute.
Just ₹1,47,000 for the full 3-year BCA (₹49,000/year), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
Real, hands-on coding, included micro-credentials and mentor support from semester 1.

testimonials.name: Arjun Nair
testimonials.quote: I loved computers but did not know where to start. The clear tracks made my choice easy.

testimonials.name: Tanvi Shah
testimonials.quote: Picking my specialisation meant the degree matched the tech job I wanted.

testimonials.name: Aditya Kumar
testimonials.quote: Real projects from semester one made me genuinely job-ready, not just certified.

testimonials.name: Pooja Reddy
testimonials.quote: A recognised BCA, learned online at my pace. It opened my first tech role.

facts.v: Data Science, Cloud, AI, Cyber Security and more
100% online, learn anytime with weekend live classes
UGC-entitled online BCA, NAAC A++ accredited
